response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior individual contributor with genuine open-source depth (founder of GISCollective, D-language ecosystem libraries, FOSS4G speaker) and broad technical range across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems. However, this is an executive-level leadership role with hard requirements he does not meet: the position demands German at C1 minimum while his resume lists German as Basic, and his career shows no formal team-leadership, technical project management, or client-advisory track record. UML, requirements management, and IT security/compliance experience are also absent, and Python is not among his listed skills.
strengths: Strong open-source and Linux background, including founding and running an open-source geo-data platform
Broad, hands-on engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing and mentoring through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: German listed as Basic, far below the required C1 minimum for a client-facing consulting role
No formal leadership, team management, or technical project management experience for an executive-level position
No evidence of UML modeling, requirements management, or IT security/risk/compliance expertise

key_factors.factor: German language gap (Basic vs required C1)
Lack of leadership and project management track record
Open-source depth and broad technical experience
